notes: Used only embedded packet data from input/task.json and input/task_brief.md.
Excel outputs contain inline formulas and references to packet lookup and citations.
Low-risk abuse cost is explicitly set to 0 because packet omitted a low-risk abuse cost value.
Decision thresholds set in sheet inputs: pass_threshold=9000, fail_threshold=15000.
